mapper.select:
SELECT id, config_name, config_key, config_value, config_type, remark, create_time FROM sys_config WHERE del_flag = '0'
AND config_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.configName}, '%')
AND config_key LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.configKey}, '%')
AND config_type = #{query.configType}
ORDER BY create_time DESC
